jobs.commentText: I don't like how the button looks on the form find another color for it @Ahmed Marwan

options.label: Deep Navy
options.caption: Swapped the button fill to a dark Navy tone so it reads as a confident, grounded CTA against the light form — kept the label near-white for contrast.
options.aiPrompt: On the Hero Form's Button instance, change the fill to the local paint style Navy/900 and set the ENQUIRE NOW label's text color style to Tone/50 for contrast. Keep the existing text style and auto layout untouched.

options.label: Warm Amber Accent
options.caption: Used an Amber accent so the button stands out as the one warm note against the otherwise neutral residence branding — trades subtlety for higher click visibility.
options.aiPrompt: On the Hero Form's Button instance, change the fill to the local paint style Amber/600 and set the ENQUIRE NOW label's text color style to Navy/900 for contrast. Keep the existing text style and auto layout untouched.

options.label: Muted Tone
options.caption: Pulled the button back to a muted mid-Tone gray so it stays quiet and on-brand with the minimal aesthetic, at the cost of some visual pop against the form.
options.aiPrompt: On the Hero Form's Button instance, change the fill to the local paint style Tone/700 and set the ENQUIRE NOW label's text color style to Tone/50 for contrast. Keep the existing text style and auto layout untouched.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Directive with quoted replacement copy and a clear nearest target node.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: I don't like how the button looks on the form find another color for it @Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: Ahmed asked to swap the button's color but gave no direction on which color, so it needs a visual judgment call rather than a single mechanical swap.

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.rationale: "this one too" gives no action or specific target beyond a tag mention, so there's nothing to execute.
report.reply: I got the pin but not the ask — I saw "this one too" without a prior comment in this thread to anchor it to. Could you tell me what change you want applied here (copy, color, spacing, etc.) so I can draft it?

report.author: Ahmed Marwan
report.comment: change this text to "Serviced Portfolio" @Ahmed Marwan
